documentation.description: NB: cannot be a child package of Compiler because of Parser, Scanner, ...

simple_types.name: Declaration_Kind
Entity_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Entity_Kind is
  (declared_number_or_enum_item,
   variable_object,
   constant_object,
   type_mark,
   paquetage,
   paquetage_body,
   prozedure,
   prozedure_intrinsic,
,
   …,
   alias);

enumeration_literals.name: declared_number_or_enum_item
enumeration_literals.description:
Declared number: untyped constant, like
"pi : constant := 3.1415927" (RM 3.3.2)

enumeration_literals.name: alias
enumeration_literals.description: Short name of another entity ("use" clause).

array_types.name: Arrays_Table_Type
array_types.code: type    Arrays_Table_Type            is array (1 .. AMax)             of Array_Table_Entry;

array_types.name: Blocks_Table_Type
array_types.code: type    Blocks_Table_Type            is array (0 .. BMax)             of Block_Table_Entry;

array_types.name: Display_Type
array_types.code: type    Display_Type                 is array (Nesting_Level)         of Integer;

array_types.name: Entries_Table_Type
array_types.code: type    Entries_Table_Type           is array (0 .. entry_table_max)  of Index;

array_types.name: Identifier_Table_Type
array_types.code: type    Identifier_Table_Type        is array (0 .. Id_Table_Max)     of Identifier_Table_Entry;

array_types.name: Nested_Loop_Table_Type
array_types.code: type    Nested_Loop_Table_Type       is array (1 .. loop_nesting_max) of Loop_Info;

array_types.name: Packages_Table_Type
array_types.code: type    Packages_Table_Type          is array (0 .. package_table_max)             of Package_Table_Entry;

array_types.name: Tasks_Definitions_Table_Type
array_types.code: type    Tasks_Definitions_Table_Type is array (0 .. TaskMax)          of Index;

array_types.name: Use_HAT_Stack_Type
array_types.code: type    Use_HAT_Stack_Type           is array (0 .. nesting_and_descending_max) of Boolean;

record_types.name: Array_Table_Entry

fields.name: Index_xTyp
fields.description: C  Subtype of the index (with bounds).

fields.name: Element_Size
fields.description: Size of an element.

fields.name: Element_xTyp
fields.description:
C  Subtype of the elements of the array.

If the elements of the array are themselves
arrays, Element_xTYP.Ref is an index to an
entry in Arrays_Table (it's not a special case).

fields.name: Array_Size
fields.description: C  Total size of the array.

fields.name: dimensions
fields.description: C  Total dimensions of the array.

record_types.name: Block_Table_Entry

fields.name: Id
fields.description: Name of the block

fields.name: Last_Id_Idx
fields.description: C index of the last identifier in this block

fields.name: First_Param_Id_Idx
fields.description: C index of the first parameter in this block

fields.name: Last_Param_Id_Idx
fields.description:
C index of the last parameter in this block

(if first > last, it's parameterless)

fields.name: PSize
fields.description: sum of the lengths of areas (1) & (2) above

fields.name: VSize
fields.description:
sum of PSize and length of area (3)

(i.e. size of the activation record for
 this block if it is a subprogram)

fields.name: SrcFrom
fields.description: Source code line count.  Source starts here

fields.name: SrcTo
fields.description: and goes until here    (* Manuel *)

record_types.name: Compilation_Trace_Parameters

fields.name: pipe
fields.description: Default: messages to Current_Error.

fields.name: progress
fields.description: Default: messages to Current_Output.

record_types.name: Constant_Rec

fields.name: I
fields.description: Includes Character and enumeration types (including Boolean)

record_types.name: Current_Unit_Data

fields.name: source_file_name
fields.description: Indicative, for error messages

fields.name: buffer_length
fields.description: = 0 only on init or when exhausted.

fields.name: buffer_position
fields.description:
Points to the next character to be read.

Parsing

fields.name: c
fields.description: Character read from source program

fields.name: prev_c
fields.description: Character read from source program

fields.name: CC
fields.description: Character counter (=column in current line)

fields.name: LL
fields.description:
Length of current line

Level 0 definitions visible to currently compiled unit:

record_types.name: Identifier_Table_Entry

fields.name: name
fields.description: Identifier name in ALL CAPS

fields.name: name_with_case
fields.description: Identifier name with original casing

fields.name: link
fields.description: Previous declaration on same nesting level, or No_Id

fields.name: entity
decl_kind
fields.description:
Declaration kind: forward or complete.

Matters for a type, a constant, a subprogram;
Values param_in .. param_out are
for subprogram parameters.

fields.name: xtyp
fields.description: Subtype identification

fields.name: block_or_pkg_ref
fields.description: Reference in the block or package tables.

fields.name: normal
fields.description: value param?

fields.name: adr_or_sz
fields.description: Address, Size; index of aliased entity (USE) !! rather use block_or_pkg_ref ?!

fields.name: is_referenced
fields.description: For any item: is it referenced at all?

fields.name: is_read
fields.description: For variable or constant: is it read?

fields.name: is_written_after_init
fields.description: Is variable written via ":=" or "out" mode?

fields.name: is_initialized
fields.description: For variable or constant: is it initialized?

record_types.name: Loop_Info

fields.name: loop_Id
fields.description: No_Id : no identifier

fields.name: is_FOR_loop
fields.description: Emit k_FOR_Release_Stack for each exited FOR loop

record_types.name: Package_Table_Entry

fields.name: last_public_declaration
fields.description: = 0 if none.

fields.name: last_private_declaration
fields.description: = 0 if none.

tagged_types.name: Compiler_Data

fields.name: CUD
fields.description: Scanning & Parsing

fields.name: Sy
fields.description: sy: last Symbol read by In_Symbol

fields.name: prev_sy
fields.description: sy: last Symbol read by In_Symbol

fields.name: Id
fields.description: Identifier from In_Symbol

fields.name: Id_with_case
fields.description: Same as Id, but with casing.

fields.name: Id_location
fields.description: Cache for Locate_CD_Id

fields.name: INum
fields.description: Integer from In_Symbol

fields.name: RNum
fields.description: Float number from In_Symbol

fields.name: SLeng
fields.description: String Length

fields.name: pkg_prefix
fields.description:
Prefix of package being currently parsed.

Compiler tables. Floats and Strings are used by interpreter at run-time.

fields.name: Arrays_Table
fields.description: NB: only static-sized arrays so far.

fields.name: Blocks_Table
fields.description: Indices to compiler tables

fields.name: Display
fields.description: Indices to compiler tables

fields.name: Entries_Table
fields.description: Indices to compiler tables

fields.name: Float_Constants_Table
fields.description: Indices to compiler tables

fields.name: id_table
fields.description: Indices to compiler tables

fields.name: Nested_Loop_Table
fields.description: Indices to compiler tables

fields.name: Packages_Table
fields.description: Indices to compiler tables

fields.name: Strings_Constants_Table
fields.description: Indices to compiler tables

fields.name: Tasks_Definitions_Table
fields.description: Indices to compiler tables

fields.name: main_proc_id_index
fields.description: No_Id <=> the main unit is not executable.

fields.name: Packages_Count
fields.description:
Object code
Mostly for HAC VM / p-code -> will be moved to HAC_Sys.Targets.HAC_Virtual_Machine)

fields.name: String_Id_Index
fields.description:
Object code
Mostly for HAC VM / p-code -> will be moved to HAC_Sys.Targets.HAC_Virtual_Machine)

fields.name: Strings_Table_Top
fields.description:
Object code
Mostly for HAC VM / p-code -> will be moved to HAC_Sys.Targets.HAC_Virtual_Machine)

fields.name: Tasks_Definitions_Count
fields.description:
Object code
Mostly for HAC VM / p-code -> will be moved to HAC_Sys.Targets.HAC_Virtual_Machine)

fields.name: LC
fields.description: Location counter in the Object_Code_Table

fields.name: CMax
fields.description:
Top of available ObjCode table;

CMax + 1 .. CDMax: variable initialization code

fields.name: folded_instructions
fields.description: Information about source code

fields.name: specialized_instructions
fields.description: Information about source code

fields.name: Full_Block_Id
fields.description: Full block's Id (P1.P2.F3.P4)

fields.name: error_count
fields.description:
On `WITH X`, we start the recursive compilation of X,
if X is not yet compiled or built-in. We monitor the
recursion level for the fun of it.

fields.name: minor_error_count
fields.description:
On `WITH X`, we start the recursive compilation of X,
if X is not yet compiled or built-in. We monitor the
recursion level for the fun of it.

fields.name: remarks
fields.description:
On `WITH X`, we start the recursive compilation of X,
if X is not yet compiled or built-in. We monitor the
recursion level for the fun of it.

fields.name: diags
fields.description:
On `WITH X`, we start the recursive compilation of X,
if X is not yet compiled or built-in. We monitor the
recursion level for the fun of it.

fields.name: total_lines
fields.description:
On `WITH X`, we start the recursive compilation of X,
if X is not yet compiled or built-in. We monitor the
recursion level for the fun of it.

fields.name: cat
fields.description:
On `WITH X`, we start the recursive compilation of X,
if X is not yet compiled or built-in. We monitor the
recursion level for the fun of it.

fields.name: trace
fields.description:
On `WITH X`, we start the recursive compilation of X,
if X is not yet compiled or built-in. We monitor the
recursion level for the fun of it.

tagged_types.name: Exact_Subtyp

fields.name: Discrete_First
fields.description: If subtype S is discrete, S'First

fields.name: Discrete_Last
fields.description: If subtype S is discrete, S'Last

tagged_types.name: Exact_Typ

fields.name: TYP
Ref
Is_Range
fields.description: ^ For X'Range expressions, indicates a pair of values waiting on the stack.

access_types.name: Compilation_Feedback
access_types.code: type Compilation_Feedback is access procedure (message : String);

access_types.name: Compiler_Data_Access
access_types.code: type Compiler_Data_Access is access all Co_Defs.Compiler_Data;

subtypes.name: Object_Kind
subtypes.code: subtype Object_Kind is Entity_Kind range variable_object .. constant_object;

subtypes.name: Parameter_Kind
subtypes.code: subtype Parameter_Kind is Declaration_Kind range param_in .. param_out;

subtypes.name: Split_Declaration_Kind
subtypes.code: subtype Split_Declaration_Kind is Declaration_Kind range spec_unresolved .. complete;

constants.name: Universe
constants.code: Universe : constant HAT.VString := HAT.To_VString ("[-- The Universe --]");

subprograms.code: procedure Construct_Root (Root : out Exact_Typ; Typ : Typen)

procedure Set_Target

subprograms.name: Size_of
subprograms.code: function Size_of (CD : Compiler_Data; Id_Index : Natural) return Positive

generic_instantiations.name: Exported_Procedure_Mapping
generic_instantiations.code:
package Exported_Procedure_Mapping is new Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Hashed_Maps
  (Key_Type        => String,
   Element_Type    => Dummy_Procedure_Access,
   Hash            => Ada.Strings.Hash,
   Equivalent_Keys => "=");

generic_instantiations.name: Id_Maps
generic_instantiations.code:
package Id_Maps is new Ada.Containers.Hashed_Maps
  (Key_Type        => Alfa,
   Element_Type    => Positive,
   Hash            => Ada.Strings.Unbounded.Hash,
   Equivalent_Keys => HAT."=");
